condition_en: On a diet: spread on the side & low carb
order_q1: What can I get for you today?
order_a1: I'd like a cheeseburger, please.|Can I get a Number One combo?|I'll do a Double-Double.
order_q2: Would you like onions on that?
order_a2: Yes for grilled onions.|No onions, thank you.|Yes, raw chopped onions, please.
order_q3: And do you want to make it a meal with fries and a drink?
order_a3: No fries, just a diet coke.|Yes, make it a meal, please.|Just the burger and a water cup.
order_a4: Could I have the spread on the side, please? I'm on a diet.|Can I get the burger protein style with spread on the side?|Extra spread, please. [WRONG]
crisis_q: Here's your protein style burger with the spread right on top. Enjoy!
crisis_a: Excuse me, I asked for the spread on the side. Could you please remake this?|Sorry, I think there is a mistake. I wanted the spread on the side.|Oh, wait, I can't eat it like this. I asked for the spread on the side.
checkout_q1: Hi! What else can I help you with today?
checkout_a1: I'd like to pay for my meal, please.|Can I get the check?|I'm ready to pay.
checkout_q2: Absolutely. Your total is $6.50. Will you be paying with cash or card?
checkout_a2: I'll pay with a credit card. Here you go.|Cash, please. Here is a ten.|Can I use Apple Pay?

condition_en: Budget under $10 & In a rush (5 mins)
order_q1: Hey there! What are we having today?
order_a1: I'll have a ShackBurger to go, please. I'm in a rush.
order_q2: Got it. Do you want any fries or a shake with that?
order_a2: No fries or shake, just the burger. My budget is under $10.
order_q3: Okay, anything to drink? A soda or water?
order_a3: Just a free cup of tap water, please.
crisis_q: Alright, with the regular fries, your total comes to $12.50.
crisis_a: Wait, I didn't order fries, and my budget is under $10. Can you take the fries off?
checkout_q1: Hi, do you need anything else for your to-go order?
checkout_a1: No, I just need to pay and leave quickly, please.
checkout_q2: Sure, the updated total is $6.50. Cash or card?
checkout_a2: Cash. Here is a ten dollar bill. Keep the change!

order_q1: Hi! What can I get started for you?
order_a1: I'll have a hot chocolate, please.
order_q2: What size would you like? Regular or large?
order_q3: And what kind of milk? We have whole, skim, oat, and almond milk.
order_a3: Almond milk, please. I'm lactose intolerant.
order_q4: Would you like to add any syrup, whipped cream, or a pastry on the side?
order_a4: No pastries, just the hot chocolate.
crisis_q: Here’s your almond milk hot chocolate with extra whipped cream on top!
crisis_a: Oh, sorry, I can't have dairy. Whipped cream has dairy in it. Can I get a new one without it?
checkout_q1: Hello again! How can I help you?
checkout_a1: I'm ready to check out, please.
checkout_q2: Your total is $4.50. Do you have our Pret app to scan for points?
checkout_a2: No, I don't have the app. I'll just pay with Apple Pay.

order_q1: Hi, what can I get started for you?
order_a1: Can I get a burrito bowl, please?|I'll do a chicken burrito. [WRONG]|Let me get three tacos.
order_q2: White or brown rice? And what kind of beans? Black or pinto?
order_a2: White rice and black beans, please.|Can I get half and half on the rice?|No beans, just extra brown rice.
order_a3: Yes, I'll take some fajita veggies.|No veggies for me, thanks.|Just a little bit of veggies, please.
order_a4: I'll do the steak. [WRONG]|Can I get half chicken and half barbacoa? [WRONG]|Just veggie.
order_q5: What kind of salsa? mild, medium, or hot salsa?
order_a5: Just the mild (Fresh Tomato Salsa), please.|I'll do the corn salsa and a little bit of the hot (Red-Chili).|Medium salsa, please.
order_q6: Anything else on there? Sour cream, cheese, or lettuce?
order_a6: I'll take sour cream, cheese, and lettuce.|Can I get extra cheese?|Just cheese, please.
order_q7: Any queso or guacamole? It's extra, is that okay?
order_a7: Yes, I'll add guac, that's fine.|A scoop of queso, please.|No thanks, that's it.
crisis_q: Here's your veggie bowl and your large fountain drink. That'll be $11.50.
crisis_a: Excuse me, I asked for a regular drink, not a large. Could you fix the size and the bill?|Sorry, I think you charged me for a large drink.|Wait, I didn't order a large drink.
checkout_q1: Any chips or drinks with that?
checkout_a1: I'll grab a side of chips and queso, and a regular fountain drink.|Just a water cup, please.|No chips, just a large Diet Coke.
checkout_q2: Alright, your total is $14.50. You can swipe or insert your card.
checkout_a2: I'll pay with a credit card. Here you go.|Do you take Apple Pay?|I have cash. Here's a twenty.

order_q1: Welcome to Olive Garden! Can I start you off with some appetizers or drinks?
order_a1: I'll have the stuffed ziti fritta for an appetizer, and a glass of red wine.
order_q2: Excellent choice. And for your main entree?
order_a2: I'll have the Fettuccine Alfredo. I have a severe seafood allergy, so please be careful.
order_q3: Noted, no seafood. Would you like to add grilled chicken to your pasta?
order_q4: We also have our unlimited soup or salad. Which one would you prefer?
order_a4: I'll take the house salad, please.
order_q5: And finally, would you like to order dessert now or wait until after the meal?
order_a5: I'll order now. Let's do the Tiramisu.
crisis_q: Here is your Shrimp Alfredo. Enjoy!
crisis_a: Excuse me, I ordered the regular Fettuccine Alfredo with chicken. I'm allergic to seafood, so I can't eat this.
checkout_q1: Hello! Is there anything else I can get for you?
checkout_a1: No, we are all set. Could we get the check, please?
checkout_q2: Certainly. Will you be paying together or splitting the bill?
checkout_a2: We will pay together. Here is my credit card.
